blocks.name: About 1
blocks.summary: Editorial two-column about section with narrative text groups and supporting image stacks.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and editorial two-column composition.
Preserve the stacked image groups instead of collapsing the block into a single hero image.
Preserve the alternating text and image rhythm unless the block is explicitly redesigned.

notes: This seed entry is based on the current AboutSection implementation.
The documentation-level contract is locked and runtime registration is implemented in the zip pagebuilder.
The block is content-only in MVP and does not define external source resolution.

blocks.name: Our Services
blocks.summary: Sticky-intro services section with a masonry-like grid of editorial service cards.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and sticky intro column.
Preserve the multi-column card layout instead of flattening the section into a simple list.
Preserve one service per card with the existing card shell and CTA treatment unless the block is explicitly redesigned.

defaultData.title: Our Services
defaultData.description: From intimate chef's table experiences to grand private events, we offer a range of bespoke culinary services designed to elevate your dining experience. Every detail is meticulously crafted to ensure unforgettable moments.

cards.title: FINE DINING
cards.description: Experience our meticulously crafted tasting menus in an elegant setting, where every dish tells a story of local terroir and culinary innovation.

cards.title: WINE PAIRING
cards.description: Expertly curated wine selections from our master sommelier to perfectly complement every dish on our tasting menu, featuring rare vintages and local discoveries.

cards.title: PRIVATE EVENTS
cards.description: Exclusive spaces and tailored menus for your most important celebrations and corporate gatherings. Our dedicated events team ensures flawless execution.

cards.title: CHEF'S TABLE
cards.description: An intimate, interactive dining experience directly overlooking our kitchen. Watch our culinary team at work and interact directly with the executive chef.

cards.title: ORGANIC SOURCING
cards.description: We partner exclusively with local, sustainable farms to bring the freshest organic ingredients to your table, supporting our community and environment.

notes: This entry is based on the current OurServices implementation.
The runtime schema and zip pagebuilder registration are implemented.
The block is content-only in MVP and keeps source set to null.

blocks.name: Story Team Showcase
blocks.summary: Editorial story section with crew highlights, narrative copy, and a full-width supporting image.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and top title row inside the six-column grid.
Preserve the left-side team highlight stack and right-side narrative copy split on larger breakpoints.
Preserve the single full-width supporting image below the text grid unless the block is explicitly redesigned.

defaultData.title: Our story
defaultData.story: We are a team of creators, thinkers, and builders who believe in crafting experiences that truly connect. Our story is built on passion, innovation, and the drive to bring meaningful ideas to life.

notes: This entry is based on the refactored PROMOCJA_sezonowa component kept for backwards-compatible imports.
The runtime schema, AI schema descriptor, and homepage pagebuilder integration are implemented.
The block is content-only in MVP and keeps source set to null.

blocks.name: Promo 2
blocks.summary: Story-led promo section with an attached lower menu panel that can resolve items from a WooCommerce category.

geometryRules: Preserve the current story/promo top section geometry and page-margin shell.
Preserve the single wide image below the text grid and attach the lower menu panel directly below it with no gap.
Preserve the image width and the attached panel width as identical, while keeping image bottom corners square.

defaultData.title: Our story
defaultData.story: We are a team of creators, thinkers, and builders who believe in crafting experiences that truly connect. Our story is built on passion, innovation, and the drive to bring meaningful ideas to life.

restrictedFields: resolved menuColumns when source is woo_category

sourceSupport.notes: Supported data mode for the attached lower menu panel. Top editorial content and image remain page-schema driven, while the menu items resolve from the specified Woo category.

notes: This block is a separate sibling of story-team-showcase and does not change homepage behavior by itself.
The lower menu panel intentionally keeps no standalone heading and uses normal-case typography.
Woo category resolution is limited to the attached menu items; the upper story section remains manual page content.

blocks.name: Promo 3
blocks.summary: Simplified promo/story section with a centered portrait image on the left and one editorial copy block on the right.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and current large editorial title row.
Preserve the two-column desktop layout with a centered portrait image on the left and editorial copy on the right.
Preserve the mobile stack order with image first and copy second.

defaultData.title: Our story
defaultData.story: We are a team of creators, thinkers, and builders who believe in crafting experiences that truly connect. Our story is built on passion, innovation, and the drive to bring meaningful ideas to life.

notes: This entry is based on the Promo3 component created as a simplified sibling of the story section.
The runtime schema and AI schema descriptor are implemented.
The block is content-only in MVP and keeps source set to null.

blocks.name: Block Download
blocks.summary: Direct-edit PDF download section with editorial intro copy, feature list, and a two-CTA download card.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and contained max-w-screen-2xl wrapper.
Preserve the left editorial intro plus feature stack and the right PDF card composition.
Preserve one primary CTA, one secondary text CTA, and helper text inside the card.

defaultData.title: Menu okolicznosciowe
defaultData.subtitle: Pobierz aktualne menu w PDF i sprawdz propozycje na przyjecia rodzinne, bankiety oraz spotkania firmowe.
defaultData.helperText: Bez logowania • Szybki podglad • Gotowe do wyslania gosciom

features.title: Jasno rozpisane zestawy, dodatki i serwis w standardzie Bulwar
Wygodny plik PDF do wysylki, druku i szybkiej konsultacji z gosciami

notes: This entry is based on the existing OccasionalMenuPdfDownloadSection implementation.
The block is direct-edit only and keeps source set to null.
Secondary CTA and helper text are visible parts of the current runtime contract.

blocks.name: Big Img And Bolded Text Editorial Style Block
blocks.summary: Direct-edit editorial block with one tall portrait image and one bold lead text block using the Promo3 composition.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell and contained max-w-screen-2xl composition.
Preserve the portrait image on the left and one lead copy block on the right.
Preserve the mobile stack order with image first and copy second.

defaultData.title: Our story
defaultData.story: We are a team of creators, thinkers, and builders who believe in crafting experiences that truly connect. Our story is built on passion, innovation, and the drive to bring meaningful ideas to life.

notes: This entry reuses the existing Promo3 component under the requested business key.
The block is direct-edit only and keeps source set to null.
The visible composition stays limited to one portrait image and one bold editorial copy block.

blocks.name: Premium Call To Action With Image Carousel
blocks.summary: Contained CTA section with one lead message, one button, and a marquee-style image carousel.

geometryRules: Preserve the page-margin shell with a contained max-w-screen-2xl wrapper.
Preserve the two-column desktop composition with copy left and image carousel right.
Preserve the marquee-based image motion pattern and omit decorative lower-right graphics.

defaultData.heading: Catering Wielkanocny
defaultData.description: Zamow z dostawa lub odbiorem w contained sekcji zgodnej z rytmem Promo2. Najwyzsza jakosc i starannie wyselekcjonowane swiateczne propozycje trafiaja prosto na stol.

notes: This entry uses CateringSection with an opt-in contained width mode aligned to Promo2.
Seeded defaults intentionally use six images, while the schema keeps images as a direct-edit array.
The decorative lower-right graphic from source inspiration is intentionally excluded from this block contract.

blocks.name: Simple Heading And Paragraph
blocks.summary: Single-column editorial/legal block with eyebrow, large heading, darker divider, and one rich-text HTML body.

geometryRules: Preserve the single-column header shell derived from the left side of Project10.
Preserve the darker divider under the header instead of restoring the right-side metadata layout.
Preserve one rich-text content column below the divider unless the block is explicitly redesigned.

richTextHtml.description: Allowlist HTML field supporting strong, b, em, i, u, p, br, ul, ol, and li tags.

defaultData.title: Jak przetwarzamy dane osobowe
defaultData.richTextHtml:
Administrator danych przetwarza dane osobowe w zakresie niezbednym do obslugi kontaktu, zapytan oraz zamowien skladanych przez klientow.

W tej sekcji mozna opisac cele przetwarzania danych, okres ich przechowywania oraz prawa osob, ktorych dane dotycza.

  • kontakt telefoniczny i mailowy
  • realizacja zamowien
  • obsluga formularzy i zapytan

notes: This implemented entry is derived from universal_header_block_2 and Project10, but it intentionally removes the right-side metadata column, CTA, hero image, and story rows.
The runtime renderer sanitizes the direct-edit HTML body against a small allowlist before rendering.
This block is intended for policies, regulations, and other informational editorial sections with source = null.

blocks.name: Menu Category Photo Parallax Full Width
blocks.summary: Full-width parallax menu section with a hero image header and a contained menu list body.

geometryRules: Preserve the full-width hero image header.
Preserve the contained menu body inside page-margin and max-w-5xl shell unless explicitly redesigned.
Preserve the desktop two-column menu presentation unless explicitly redesigned.

sourceSupport.notes: Supported real-data mode. Source value may be a Woo category slug or id. Heading should resolve from category name, while the parallax image stays in block data.
Secondary source mode for explicitly selected Woo product ids.

notes: This is the first seed registry entry.
It is based on the current BreakfastSection implementation.
Demo defaults are intentionally kept as filler content for static and preview usage.
In real Woo-driven mode, the preferred path is category-based resolution by Woo category slug or id.

blocks.name: Gallery Masonry Style 1
blocks.summary: Masonry-style image gallery with staggered columns and subtle scroll-driven motion.

geometryRules: Preserve the staggered masonry column composition.
Preserve the section shell using page-margin and max-w-screen-2xl unless explicitly redesigned.
Preserve the image-count assumption that fills the gallery shape with seven image slots unless the block is structurally redesigned.

sourceSupport.notes: Future refinement can allow gallery images to resolve from structured media bindings instead of only raw image arrays.

notes: This seed entry is based on the current GallerySection implementation.
The current component uses Framer Motion and scroll transforms as part of the visual treatment.
Alt text is already part of the stored contract even though the current React adapter only maps image src values into the legacy component prop shape.
A later refinement pass should decide whether captions or media bindings need to become first-class content fields.
